home.heroSubtitle1: Connect at home or on the move

card.homesDesc: Get internet at home — start below to see plans and pricing
card.roamDesc: Stay connected while traveling across 150+ markets

home.globalTitle: Fast connectivity wherever and whenever you need it
home.globalDesc: Available in 150+ countries, territories and other markets worldwide
home.globalCta: Check service availability and plans in your area ›
home.reliableDesc: Starlink delivers high-speed, low-latency internet with average uptime above 99.9% and reliable connectivity around the world. Starlink kits are engineered to withstand all weather — they can melt snow and endure ice, heavy rain and strong winds.
home.allNeedsDesc: Starlink delivers speeds of 400+ Mbps in most locations worldwide, giving you the freedom to stream 4K on multiple devices, work effectively from home, game online, browse social media and more.
home.allNeedsLink: Check speeds in your area here.
home.connectIntro: Set up Starlink in just two steps:
home.connectStep2: Point the dish at the sky
home.connectNote: Starlink hardware requires a clear, unobstructed view of the sky. Then download the Starlink app to find the best installation spot.
home.plansDesc: Starlink offers flexible service plans everywhere. Check availability by entering your address
home.spacexDesc: As the world's leading launch provider — and the only one with reusable orbital-class rockets — SpaceX brings deep expertise in both spacecraft and on-orbit operations.

residential.heroAlt: Starlink dish mounted on a rooftop at sunset
residential.heroSub1: Reliable high-speed internet, wherever you are.
residential.heroSub3: No upfront hardware cost on select plans.
residential.plansHeading: Stream movies, video call, game, and more
residential.plansCta: Get started below to view plans, speeds, and promotions available in your area

plan.liteDesc: Reliable high-speed internet for everyday home use
plan.homesDesc: Best-performing home internet at the highest available speeds

email.title: Receive STARLINK updates by email
email.subtitle: Subscribe below
email.compactTitle: Want to stay up to date with the latest from Starlink?

useCases.streamBody: Enjoy high speeds for streaming on your favorite platforms, plus movies and live events in HD and 4K.
useCases.workBody: Work from home with Starlink high-speed internet — clear video calls, sharp imagery, and conversations without interruption.
useCases.gameBody: Game online from home or on the move with Starlink's low-latency network.
useCases.videoBody: Stay connected with friends, family, and your community without high latency or connection delays.

mini.desc: Starlink Mini is a compact, portable kit that fits easily in a backpack — designed to deliver high-speed, low-latency internet on the move. It features a built-in Wi-Fi router, DC power input, lower power consumption, and peak download speeds of 200+ Mbps.

feature.anywhereDesc: Do things you never thought possible over satellite internet, powered by the world's largest constellation of advanced satellites operating in low Earth orbit.
feature.reliableDesc: Starlink delivers high-speed, low-latency internet with average uptime above 99.9% and reliable connectivity around the world. Starlink kits are engineered to withstand all weather — they can melt snow and endure ice, heavy rain and strong winds.
feature.allNeedsDesc: Starlink delivers speeds of 400+ Mbps in most locations worldwide, giving you the freedom to stream 4K on multiple devices, work effectively from home, game online, browse social media and more.
feature.allNeedsLink: Check speeds in your area here.
feature.selfInstallIntro: Set up Starlink in just two steps:
feature.step2: Point the dish at the sky
feature.selfInstallNote: Starlink hardware requires a clear, unobstructed view of the sky. Then download the Starlink app to find the best installation spot.
feature.unlimitedDesc: Starlink residential plans include unlimited, high-speed data options for your home.

box.title: What's in the standard box
box.desc: Every Starlink kit comes with everything you need to get online in minutes.

testimonials.heading: Customer reviews
testimonials.t1Quote: It's a different world... before Starlink, we had to ration our data and couldn't watch or stream video. Now we can download files, run Pandora, and Zoom video call without any service delay.
testimonials.t2Quote: An internet revolution. The service is properly available, unlike our previous ISP that was painfully slow. You just install the hardware and point the dish at the sky. It only took 5 minutes to get the fastest internet in the area.
testimonials.t3Quote: Millions of people in the world are offline, and we're happy to say we're no longer one of them. We were online with high-speed internet within minutes — Starlink ended a six-year wait.
testimonials.t3Author: Neil V. — New South Wales, Australia

trial.title: 30-day trial
trial.desc: Try Starlink for 30 days. If you're not satisfied, you can return it for a full refund.

roam.heroAlt: Starlink Roam under a starry sky
roam.subtitle: Stay connected while camping, traveling, or in remote locations. Fast setup and reliable satellite coverage across Jordan and around the world.

business.contactDesc: Get a custom quote for your needs in the {{vertical}} sector.

form.name: Full name
form.successToastDesc: The {{vertical}} team will contact you within 24 hours.
form.thanksDesc: Your request has been received and we'll respond shortly.

overview.title: Starlink for Business — Reliable connectivity for your organization
overview.description: High-speed, low-latency satellite internet solutions designed for the needs of companies, offices, and field projects across Jordan.
overview.f2Desc: Set up in minutes at virtually any location.
overview.f3Desc: A dedicated enterprise support team for your account.

fixed.title: Starlink for Fixed Sites
fixed.description: Reliable high-speed internet for offices, factories, and remote sites — with rapid deployment and enterprise-grade performance.
fixed.f1Desc: Certified installers set up the equipment on-site to the highest standards.
fixed.f2Desc: High-priority data quota ensures consistent performance for critical operations.
fixed.f3Desc: Custom service-level agreements with uptime and performance guarantees.
fixed.f4Desc: Unified management portal to monitor all your devices across multiple locations.
fixed.f5Desc: Dedicated enterprise support team available around the clock.
fixed.f6Desc: Operates in the harshest conditions from −30°C to +50°C.

maritime.title: Starlink for Maritime
maritime.description: High-speed internet at sea — for commercial vessels, yachts, and oil platforms, with global coverage in international waters.
maritime.f1Desc: Continuous connectivity on the high seas and along major shipping lanes.
maritime.f2Desc: Motion-tracking antenna keeps up with vessel pitch and roll.
maritime.f3Desc: Plenty of bandwidth for entertainment and staying in touch with families during long voyages.
maritime.f4Desc: Real-time navigation, shipping, and operational communications data.
maritime.f5Desc: Salt- and vibration-resistant hardware certified for marine use.
maritime.f6Desc: Pause service in port and only activate it while underway.

aviation.title: Starlink for Aviation
aviation.description: Gigabit-class internet in the cabin — a seamless experience for passengers and flight crew with low latency at 35,000 feet.
aviation.f1Desc: Up to 220 Mbps per passenger — enough to stream video and join meetings.
aviation.f2Desc: Lightweight, low-profile flat antenna that minimizes drag.
aviation.f3Desc: Instant sign-in with no passwords and no ads.
aviation.f4Desc: Real-time weather, navigation, and maintenance data.
aviation.f5Desc: Continuous connectivity across continents, oceans, and polar regions.
aviation.f6Desc: Installs much faster than traditional systems.

mobile.title: Starlink Mobile for Business
mobile.description: Reliable connectivity for fleets, field operations, and emergency response — with hardware that works in motion and coverage in 150+ markets.
mobile.f1Desc: Hardware certified to operate while vehicles move on roads and off-road.
mobile.f2Desc: Track and monitor all your vehicles from a unified management portal.
mobile.f3Desc: Rapid deployment to disaster sites to restore connectivity.
mobile.f4Desc: Stream video from field sites with low latency.
mobile.f6Desc: Monthly or annual subscriptions tailored to your fleet's needs.

communityGateway.title: Community Gateway — Connectivity for remote areas
communityGateway.description: A high-capacity solution that connects villages, rural communities, and isolated regions to fast Starlink internet via a single local gateway serving thousands of users.
communityGateway.f1Desc: Up to 10 Gbps per gateway to serve an entire community.
communityGateway.f2Desc: Up and running in days instead of years of traditional infrastructure.
communityGateway.f3Desc: A control panel to manage users, plans, and subscription billing.
communityGateway.f4Desc: Reliable backup connectivity for hospitals, schools, and essential services.
communityGateway.f5Desc: An economic model that lowers the cost per gigabyte for end users.
communityGateway.f6Desc: A dedicated engineering team for installation, operations, and routine maintenance.

privateNetworking.title: Private Networking — Secure, isolated connectivity
privateNetworking.description: Build a fully private network over Starlink with static IP addresses, dedicated VLANs, and complete isolation from the public internet to protect your sensitive enterprise data.
privateNetworking.f1Desc: Your traffic never traverses the public internet.
privateNetworking.f2Desc: Static IPv4 and IPv6 addresses per site to integrate with your systems.
privateNetworking.f3Desc: Easily segment your network by departments or branches.
privateNetworking.f4Desc: Advanced protection for all data transmitted over the network.
privateNetworking.f5Desc: Direct connectivity with AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud.

support.title: How can we help?
support.description: Answers to the most common questions, with a support team available 24/7.

faqs.a: In two simple steps: connect the dish and point it at the sky.
The device needs a clear, unobstructed view of the sky.
Yes, you can pause or resume the service from your account at any time.
Yes, a 30-day trial with a full refund if you are not satisfied.

servicePlans.title: Flexible service plans for every need
servicePlans.description: Pick a category and use type to view plans and pricing.

specifications.title: Technical specifications
specifications.description: Full details on Starlink hardware performance and specifications.

technology.title: Engineered by SpaceX
technology.description: Starlink is the largest constellation of satellites in low Earth orbit, delivering high-speed, low-latency internet around the world.

sections.d: Starlink satellites orbit at about 550 km, dramatically reducing latency compared to traditional satellites.
SpaceX is the only company launching reusable orbital rockets, enabling rapid deployment.
Data is relayed at the speed of light between satellites in space, reducing reliance on ground stations.

stories.title: Real stories from our customers
stories.description: Discover how people use Starlink in their daily lives and businesses.

items.name: Ahmad, Petra
items.quote: Finally fast, reliable internet in our mountainous area.

items.name: Sara, Amman
items.quote: I work from home with zero downtime since installing Starlink.

items.name: Khalid, Wadi Rum
items.quote: It changed camping — full connectivity in the heart of the desert.

updates.title: Latest updates and news
updates.description: Stay informed about the latest releases, improvements, and new features.

items.title: Coverage expansion in Jordan
items.body: Starlink service is now available in more rural regions across the kingdom.

items.title: Firmware update v2.5
items.body: Performance and latency improvements for all Starlink devices.

items.title: Global Roam plan launch
items.body: Coverage in over 150 markets worldwide is now available.

videos.title: Video guides to help you every step of the way
videos.description: Learn how to set up and use Starlink through instructional videos.
items: How to aim the dish at the sky

resellers.description: Join the network of authorized resellers and offer satellite internet services to your customers with full support from our team.

benefits.description: Earn tiered commissions as your sales volume grows.

benefits.title: Regional exclusivity
benefits.description: Exclusive distribution rights in your approved geographic area.

benefits.title: Certified training
benefits.description: Comprehensive technical and sales training programs for your team.

benefits.title: Marketing support
benefits.description: Ready-made marketing materials and joint advertising campaigns.

resellers.sentDesc: We will review your partnership application and get back to you within 5 business days.
resellers.successDesc: Our team will review your application and contact you within 5 business days.

reliability.title: Consistent, dependable performance
reliability.description: Average uptime above 99.9% and reliable connectivity worldwide. Hardware built to withstand all weather conditions.
